_comment_translation: Robot starting position [x, y, z] in meters. Table is at y=-1.0, so larger y = farther from table.
_comment_detector: Backend de deteccion por nombre: 'oracle' (verdad-de-tierra del sim, default, 100% en simulacion) o 'yolo' (YOLO-World sobre RGB, para robot real).

robocasa._comment: Set enabled to true to load RoboCasa kitchen environment. Task examples: PnPCounterToCab, PnPCounterToSink, PnPSinkToCounter, etc. Layout and style are integer IDs (0-9 typically).
